languages.original_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

languages.text: "Неумирающий прошептал имя Амик'Себериана многие циклы назад и находится рядом с ним было... мучительно. Но твое еще с тобой, Амик'Абеляр, и тебе рано печалиться".
"The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."
languages.original_text: "Неумирающий прошептал имя Амик'Себериана многие циклы назад и находится рядом с ним было... мучительно. Но твое еще с тобой, Амик'Абеляр, и тебе рано печалиться".

traits.locale_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."
"The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."
"The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

languages.text: 「『死なぬ者』は数えきれぬほどのサイクル前にドミン・セベリアンの名を囁いた。彼の近くにいることは…耐え難い苦痛だった。しかし、君の名は今も君と共にある、アミック・アベラール。まだ悲しむには早すぎる」
languages.original_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

traits.locale_text: 「死なぬ者」は数えきれないほどのサイクル前にドミナス・セベリアンを呼びかけ、彼の近くにいることは苦痛だった。しかし、君の名は君と共にあり、アミク・アベラール、まだ悲しむには早すぎる。」
「『死なぬ者』は数えきれぬほどのサイクル前にドミン・セベリアンの名を囁いた。彼の近くにいることは…耐え難い苦痛だった。しかし、君の名は今も君と共にある、アミック・アベラール。まだ悲しむには早すぎる」

languages.text: « L'Immortel a murmuré le nom de Domin'Seberian il y a de nombreux cycles, et le simple fait de se trouver en sa présence était... insoutenable. Mais votre nom est toujours avec vous, Amic'Abélard, il est trop tôt pour que vous vous laissiez aller au chagrin. »
languages.original_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

traits.locale_text: « L'Immortel a murmuré le nom de Domin'Seberian il y a de nombreux cycles, et le simple fait de se trouver en sa présence était... insoutenable. Mais votre nom est toujours avec vous, Amic'Abélard, il est trop tôt pour que vous vous laissiez aller au chagrin. »

languages.text: "Der Todlose hat den Namen von Domin'Seberian vor so vielen Zyklen geflüstert, und in seiner Nähe zu sein, war ... unerträglich. Aber Euer Name besteht fort, Amic'abelard. Es es ist zu früh für Euch, zu trauern."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

traits.locale_text: "Der Todlose hat den Namen von Domin'Seberian vor so vielen Zyklen geflüstert, und in seiner Nähe zu sein, war ... unerträglich. Aber Euer Name besteht fort, Amic'abelard. Es es ist zu früh für Euch, zu trauern."

languages.text: "Ölmeyen, Domin'Seberian'ın adını pek çok döngü önce fısıldamıştı. Onun yakınında olmak... Izdırap vericiydi. Fakat senin adın seninle kalıyor Amik'Abelard, yas tutman için henüz çok erken."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

traits.locale_text: "Ölmeyen, Domin'Seberian'ın adını pek çok döngü önce fısıldamıştı. Onun yakınında olmak... Izdırap vericiydi. Fakat senin adın seninle kalıyor Amik'Abelard, yas tutman için henüz çok erken."

languages.text: «El Inmortal susurró el nombre de Domin'Seberian hace muchos ciclos, y estar en su presencia ha sido... insoportable. Pero su nombre aún no le ha abandonado, Amic'Abelard, y es demasiado pronto para afligirse por ello».
languages.original_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

traits.locale_text: «El Inmortal susurró el nombre de Domin'Seberian hace muchos ciclos, y estar en su presencia ha sido... insoportable. Pero su nombre aún no le ha abandonado, Amic'Abelard, y es demasiado pronto para afligirse por ello».

languages.text: “不死之神早于诸多轮回前便低语过秘者塞贝里安的名讳，靠近他如同经受酷刑……但你的名字仍属于你自己，信者阿贝拉德，此刻伤怀还为时过早。”
languages.original_text: "The Undying One whispered Domin'Seberian's name many cycles ago, and being near him was... excruciating. But your name remains with you, Amic'Abelard, and it is too soon for you to sorrow."

traits.locale_text: “不死之神早于诸多轮回前便低语过秘者塞贝里安的名讳，靠近他如同经受酷刑……但你的名字仍属于你自己，信者阿贝拉德，此刻伤怀还为时过早。”
